name: Microwave Stuffed Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 9 Fresh, raw, jumbo shrimp (about 1/2 lb.), shelled
6 1/2 oz can crab meat, drained and cartilage removed
recipeInstructions:
1. To butterfly the shrimp, make a cut down the middle of the back from tail to thick end, cutting almost all the way through. With the point of a knife, loosen and remove the vein.
2. Arrange the shrimp, cut side up, on the microwave rack, tails toward the center.
3. Spread the butter in a medium mixing bowl. Microwave on high for 30 to 45 seconds or until the butter melts.
4. Stir in crab meat, bread crumbs, parsley, lemon juice, cayenne, and salt.
5. Divide the stuffing evenly on top of the shrimp.
6. Cover with wax paper. Place the microwave rack in the oven.
7. Reduce power to medium (50%). Microwave for 5 to 7 minutes or until the shrimp are opaque.
8. Garnish with paprika and lemon wedges. Serves 3.
